brent_crude.name: Brent Crude Oil
brent_crude.description: Price of Brent crude oil, the global benchmark.

crack_spread.name: Crack Spread (3-2-1)
crack_spread.description: Refining margin: cost to turn crude into gasoline & diesel. Measures refinery stress.

calendar_spread.name: Brent Calendar Spread
calendar_spread.description: Front-month minus second-month Brent futures. Positive = backwardation (tight supply).

industrial_production.name: Industrial Production Index
industrial_production.description: Measures real output of US factories, mines, and utilities. Proxy for manufacturing health.

eu_natural_gas.name: EU Natural Gas Price
eu_natural_gas.description: European natural gas price. When high, fertilizer & chemical plants shut down.

capacity_utilization.name: Industrial Capacity Utilization
capacity_utilization.description: Percent of industrial capacity in use. Drops when plants shut down.

hy_credit_spread.name: High-Yield Credit Spread
hy_credit_spread.description: Extra interest risky companies pay to borrow. Widens when lenders get scared.

jobless_claims.name: Initial Jobless Claims
jobless_claims.description: Weekly new unemployment filings. Spikes when companies start laying off.

inflation_expectations.name: Consumer Inflation Expectations
inflation_expectations.description: University of Michigan survey: what consumers expect inflation to be next year.

bizd_etf.name: BDC Income ETF (BIZD)
bizd_etf.description: ETF tracking ~25 publicly traded BDCs that make private loans to mid-market companies.

arcc.name: Ares Capital (ARCC)
arcc.description: Largest publicly traded BDC ($25B+ portfolio). Named in recent private credit redemption gate reports.

main_street.name: Main Street Capital (MAIN)
main_street.description: High-quality BDC bellwether. If this drops significantly, broad private credit distress is likely.

history_notes.2020-03: COVID crash: fell ~50% despite strong portfolio

overall.label: Elevated — Some indicators showing significant stress
